MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Defendant Kenneth Sharp's motion to compel further responses to special interrogatories #8, 9 (set #2) is denied. All requests for monetary sanctions are denied. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.

Ntc Of Mtn & Mtn For Order Granting Leave To File 1st Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Feb-11-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF BARRETT BLOCK PARTNERS, L.P.'S MOTION FOR ORDER GRANTING LEAVE TO FILE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT.
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. PLAINTIFF MAY FILE AN AMENDED COMPLAINT WITH THE FIRST TWO CAUSES OF ACTION, BUT NOT THE THIRD CAUSE OF ACTION, WHICH SEEKS TO STATE A CLAIM FOR NEGLIGENT BREACH OF A CONTRACTUAL DUTY. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A FORM OF ORDER. (302/PJB/AY) JUDGE: PETER BUSCH, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO COMPLAINT

MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF BARRETT BLOCK PARTNERS, L.P.'S DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO COMPLAINT.
